creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
FreeBSD zircon.zircon.seattle.wa.us 6.2-STABLE FreeBSD 6.2-STABLE #3: 
Wed May 23 20:02:37 PDT 2007     
root@zircon.zircon.seattle.wa.us:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ZIRCON  amd64

I build every single time on amd64 as shown above with absolutely zero 
problems.  I can find no problems related to amd64 in any messages from 
Glenn Fowler on the official mailing list.

I strongly suggest that you contact gsf@research.att.com and discuss 
your problems with him.  Please let me know what you find out and I can 
update the port to reflect it.

ksh93s+ build perfectly on my FreeBSD 6.2 amd64 system.

/Joe
